ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which this price entry relates */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price reached on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price reached on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the trading day */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the stock for the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio for the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view price history, download report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (buy/sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of stock traded */,
  "price_at_action" REAL /* Price of the stock at the time of the action */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade (price * amount) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Any fees associated with the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the report for categorization */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the report is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend observation */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend observed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "magnitude" TEXT /* Magnitude of the trend (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to identify the trend */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is associated with */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
